description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in elaborate, futuristic armor with a high-collared cape and metallic gauntlets. The armor features intricate paneling, gold trim, and reinforced shoulder pads, giving a sense of both protection and authority. The figure has a stern facial expression, a full beard, and medium-length, swept-back hair. The outfit includes a long, split cape, armored boots, and detailed mechanical elements on the arms and legs, suggesting a blend of traditional and sci-fi aesthetics. The overall appearance is imposing, with a strong, upright posture and a commanding presence. The materials and design evoke a character suited for a high-tech urban or dystopian environment.
description: An armored adult male with a high-collared cape, metallic gauntlets, and a stern expression, blending traditional and futuristic design elements.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the long, split cape, reinforced shoulder armor, and the back of the boots.
description_view_1: Left profile highlighting the layered armor, mechanical gauntlet, and the side of the cape.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the stern face, high-collared cape, detailed chest armor, and both gauntlets.
description_view_3: Right profile showing the mechanical details on the arm, side of the boots, and the cape's drape.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored suit with high-collared cape, reinforced shoulder pads, and mechanical gauntlets
